goal: Create plugins/open-graph-card.js that shows rich link preview cards for URLs in messages
sub_tasks: T1: Create IIFE skeleton with __OgCardInited guard
T3: In handler: if role !== 'assistant', return. Scan bubble for bare URLs
T4: For first URL per message, exclude URLs in <pre>/<code>, exclude image file extensions
T5: Check localStorage cache: 'hermes-og-cache:<url>' TTL 1hr (JSON string with timestamp)
T6: If cache miss, fetch('/api/og?url=' + encodeURIComponent(url))
T7: On response, create <div class='og-card'> with title (h3), desc (p), image (img with error handler), domain text
T8: Insert card after the message bubble's parent .msg
T9: Store response in localStorage cache with try/catch
guard_focus: Does it only create ONE card per message (first URL)?
Does it skip URLs inside code blocks?
Is localStorage cache checked before fetch?
Does image have error handler to hide broken images?
Is card inserted after the message, not inside the bubble?
notes: ~60 lines. Needs /api/og endpoint from core-api-og-a. Uses localStorage for caching.
